title: (Bearish Signal) NMM, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling NMM's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 48 similar cases where NMM's MACD histogram became negative, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 79%. Current price $28.76 crossed the support line at $25.08 and is trading between $30.09 resistance and $25.08 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/18/21 - 04/20/21, the price experienced a +3% Uptrend, while the week of 04/13/21 - 04/20/21 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/u2rqwvkc7ku61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=ad1a1a4204bd4a94bc80d05b5d8be7f4bf07909f

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for NMM moved out of overbought territory on March 23, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 29 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 22 of the 29 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 76%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of 49 cases where NMM's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 71%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where NMM declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 77%.

NMM broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 22, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10698668-navios-maritime-partners-l-p-unit-s-nmm-26-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-negative)
